sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import InfoPageLayout from "./InfoPageLayout"; const pageData = { title: "Terms of Service", subtitle: "Please read these terms carefully before using CyberVault services.", sections: [ { title: "Acceptance of Terms", content: `

By accessing and using CyberVault's services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, you should not use our services.

` }, { title: "Description of Service", bgColor: "#f8fafc", content: `

CyberVault provides cloud-based cybersecurity services including but not limited to:

  • Threat detection and prevention
  • Security monitoring and alerting
  • Compliance management
  • Incident response automation
  • Security analytics and reporting

We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any part of the service at any time with reasonable notice.

` }, { title: "User Obligations", content: `

As a user of CyberVault services, you agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete registration information
  • Maintain the security of your account credentials
  • Not use the service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
  • Not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the system
  • Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
  • Not interfere with or disrupt the service
` }, { title: "Intellectual Property", content: `

The CyberVault service, including all content, features, and functionality, is owned by CyberVault Security, Inc. and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our service without prior written consent.

` }, { title: "Payment Terms", bgColor: "#f8fafc", content: `

For paid services:

  • Fees are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis
  • All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise specified
  • You authorize us to charge your payment method for all fees
  • Prices are subject to change with 30 days notice
  • Overdue payments may result in service suspension
` }, { title: "Limitation of Liability", content: `

CYBERVAULT SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. WE DO NOT GUARANTEE THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, SECURE, OR ERROR-FREE.

IN NO EVENT SHALL CYBERVAULT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL.

` }, { title: "Indemnification", content: `

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless CyberVault and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from:

  • Your use of the service
  • Your violation of these terms
  • Your violation of any third-party rights
` }, { title: "Termination", content: `

We may terminate or suspend your access to the service immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including breach of these terms.

Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease. All provisions which by their nature should survive termination shall survive.

` }, { title: "Contact Us", content: `

Questions about these Terms of Service should be sent to:

  • Email: legal@cybervault.io
  • Mail: CyberVault Security, Inc., 1 CyberVault Way, San Francisco, CA 94105

Last updated: February 2026

` } ], color: "#6b7280" }; function Terms() { return ; } export default Terms;
